heading: Building
Nepal's
Future.
hero.paragraph: Government-certified contractor specializing in roads, bridges, buildings, and critical infrastructure across Nepal. Precision engineering, delivered on time.

about.paragraph1: Founded in 2006, Aadi Shakti Nirman Sewa Pvt. Ltd. has grown from a regional contractor to one of Nepal's most trusted infrastructure builders. We operate with a government-registered class 'A' license, participating in and winning tenders across road construction, bridge fabrication, hydropower civil works, and institutional buildings.
about.paragraph2: Our team of qualified engineers and skilled technicians brings together local knowledge with international construction standards — ensuring every structure we build stands for generations.

pillars.title: Precision Engineering
pillars.description: Every project follows strict engineering standards — from soil analysis to structural integrity, we leave nothing to chance.

pillars.title: Integrity First
pillars.description: Transparent timelines, honest budgets, and zero compromises on material quality. Our reputation is built on trust.

pillars.title: Local Expertise
pillars.description: Deep knowledge of Nepal's terrain, climate, and regulatory frameworks allows us to deliver where others cannot.

services.name: Building Construction
services.description: Government offices, schools, hospitals, and institutional structures built to last across Nepal's demanding conditions.

services.name: Bridge & Culvert Works
services.description: Single-lane footbridges to multi-span motorable bridges, designed for seismic zones and monsoon conditions.

services.name: Road Construction
services.description: Earthwork, sub-base, and bituminous surfacing for district roads, urban roads, and strategic highways under GoN tender.

services.name: Hydropower Civil Works
services.description: Headworks, penstock trenching, powerhouse construction, and access roads for micro and small hydropower projects.

services.name: Retaining Walls & Drainage
services.description: Slope stabilization, gabion walls, RCC retaining structures, and storm drainage for landslide-prone zones.

services.name: Project Management
services.description: End-to-end project supervision, quality control, and contractor management for large government and donor-funded projects.

projects.title: Sindhuli–Bardibas Road Upgrading
projects.description: Upgrading 12.6 km of gravel road to bituminous standard including drainage and slope protection works.

projects.title: Koshi Corridor Bridge, 80m Span
projects.description: Double-lane RCC T-girder bridge with approach roads, completed ahead of schedule during monsoon season.

projects.title: District Hospital Complex, Dolakha
projects.description: 3-storey RCC hospital building with outpatient, inpatient, and operation theatre facilities under MoHP tender.

projects.title: Tamakoshi Micro Hydro Civil Works
projects.description: Headworks, penstock trench, and powerhouse civil works for 500 kW run-of-river micro hydropower project.

projects.title: Bhaktapur Ring Road Resurfacing
projects.description: Full-depth reclamation and asphalt overlay of 8 km urban ring road with curb and gutter rehabilitation.

projects.title: Mechi Zone Footbridge Cluster
projects.description: Three 60–80m steel suspension footbridges connecting remote villages to the road network in Mechi zone.

contact.address: Kathmandu Metropolitan City, Bagmati Province, Nepal

footer.description: Building Nepal's infrastructure with precision, integrity, and local expertise since 2006.
